items.title: How The Investment Story For Zions Bancorporation (ZION) Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Signals
items.description: Zions Bancorporation National Association sits in an interesting spot right now, with the fair value estimate holding steady at US$66.57 even as the broader analyst conversation shifts. Recent research has mixed views, with some firms lifting price targets and others moving to more neutral stances, arguing about how much upside is already reflected in the current share price. As you read on, you will see what is changing in the story, what is not, and how you can track this evolving analyst...

items.title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon Admits To Owning Bitcoin After Previously Saying It Had No Real Use Case
items.description: Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) CEO David Solomon now owns Bitcoin despite previously questioning its value proposition. Solomon holds a "very, very limited" amount of Bitcoin, Bloomberg quoted him as saying on Feb. 18 at the World Liberty Forum tech and finance...
